notes: Capture now recovers its login by itself: if you sign out on the website or your session gets revoked, it refreshes — or signs back in with your saved credentials (Remember my credentials) — and keeps uploading. Laps are always kept safe on disk until the upload is confirmed.
notas: O Capture agora recupera o login sozinho: se você deslogar no site ou a sessão for revogada, ele renova — ou reloga com as credenciais salvas (Remember my credentials) — e continua subindo as voltas. As voltas ficam guardadas no disco até o upload ser confirmado.
